narrative:
Sagamore Hills Twp I (precinct in Summit County) has 965 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a clear Republican lean of 7.2 percentage points.
